reference: Hello, at this time you should go with the cardiologist's opinion because the heart is the culprit for your shortness of breath. Do not delay because a single heart attack can be fatal as well. Thank you.
text: Hello. At this time, you should go with the cardiologist' opinion because the heart is the culprit for your shortness of breath. Do not delay because a single heart attack can be fatal as well. Thank you.
